request.description: Authenticate user with email and password. Returns a non-expiring accessToken in the JSON body — store it permanently and send as "Authorization: Bearer <token>" on every subsequent request. No cookies are ever set. No refreshToken is returned (mobile tokens never expire). If OTP/2FA is required the accessToken is NOT returned — the response contains requires_otp:true and user_id. The app must then call POST /mobile/auth/verify-otp with that user_id and the emailed code.

Create a new job seeker account. Returns a non-expiring accessToken — no cookies are set. If admin has email verification enabled, requires_otp:true is returned and no token is issued — call POST /mobile/auth/verify-otp next.

Create a new employer account with company details. Returns a non-expiring accessToken — no cookies are set. If admin has email verification enabled, requires_otp:true is returned. When ch_company_number is provided (and is_non_limited is false), the server verifies the company against the live Companies House API: blocks if the company is not active, blocks if another employer already registered the same company number, and uses the authoritative CH data to populate the company record. If CH integration is disabled or the API is unreachable the check is skipped and registration proceeds. The company_website field accepts URLs with or without https:// — the protocol is added automatically.

Verify the 6-digit OTP sent to the user's email after registration or login (when 2FA is enabled). The user_id comes from the login or register response when requires_otp:true. On success a non-expiring accessToken is returned — store it permanently and use as Authorization: Bearer <token>.
Resend the signup/verification OTP to the user's email. Use when the user didn't receive the code after registration. Requires the user_id from the register response.
Get the authenticated user info from the Bearer token. Use on app launch to validate the stored token and restore the session.
Log out the current session. The server records an audit event. No cookies are cleared (mobile has none) — the app must discard the stored accessToken immediately after calling this endpoint.
Send a password reset code to the given email address. Always returns 200 to prevent email enumeration.
Reset the account password using the code received by email. All body fields are snake_case.
Get paginated public job listings with full search and filter support. All params are optional and combinable.
Get full details for a single job posting including company info, skills, and salary.
Get the screening questions for a job. Used in the apply flow before submission.

Get all active categories managed by admin. Serves two purposes: (1) job category filter on the job search screen, (2) industry selector on the employer company profile (industry_category_id field). Call once on app launch and cache.
Get platform-wide statistics. Displayed on homepage hero section.
Get all active subscription plans for employer upgrade/billing screens.
Get paginated public company directory. Suspended employer companies are excluded.

Get company profile and its active job listings. Returns 404 if profile is set to private. Contact info (contact_person, contact_email) is only included when the employer has enabled show_contact_info AND the request is authenticated.

Get all countries that the admin has set to active. Used for: (1) dial code picker on phone number inputs (phone_code field), (2) country selector on seeker profile location, (3) country selector on job search filter, (4) company location on employer profile. Only countries enabled by admin are returned.

Get the full list of skills managed by admin. Used for: (1) skill tag picker on seeker profile (send selected skill IDs in the skills array when updating profile), (2) preferred_skills autocomplete on job post form. Call once on app launch and cache.
Get public-safe site settings: site name, logo, colors, feature flags. SMTP/private credentials are excluded. Call on app launch.
Get all homepage CMS content: hero text, how-it-works steps, AI features, testimonials header, CTA section.
Get active testimonials for display on homepage. Returns empty array if testimonials are disabled in admin settings.
Get all published CMS pages (About, Privacy Policy, Terms, etc.).
Get a single CMS page by its slug. Used for About, Privacy, Terms screens in mobile.
Submit a contact/support message. Rate limited to 5 requests per 15 minutes per IP.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Acme Technologies Ltd",
  "email": "john.doe@example.com",
  "phone": "7911 123456",
  "subject": "General Enquiry",
  "message": "Hello, I have a question about using the platform."
}

request.description: Search Companies House for registered UK companies by name. Used during employer registration to pre-fill company details. Rate limited to 30 requests per minute. Returns empty array if query is under 2 characters. If the CH API is unavailable or the integration is disabled, returns { success: true, data: [], error: "..." } (always HTTP 200) — the app should allow the user to proceed with manual entry in that case.
Get full details for a specific UK registered company from Companies House by company number. Used during employer registration to auto-fill all company fields.
Get all admin-controlled feature flags relevant to the job seeker app. No user authentication required — call this at app launch to conditionally show/hide features. All values are booleans.
Get the authenticated seeker full profile: personal info, skills, experience, resume list, preferences.

Update any part of the seeker profile in one call. All fields are optional — only send what changed. Covers personal info, location, relocation, professional info, skills, work experience, education, and online presence.

body.raw:
{ "first_name": "John", "last_name": "Doe", "phone": "7911 123456", "phone_code": "+44", "show_phone": true, "country": "GB", "city": "London", "address": "123 Oxford Street", "zip_code": "W1D 1BS", "open_to_relocation": true, "relocation_type": "specific", "relocation_cities": "Manchester, Birmingham", "headline": "Senior React Developer · 5+ yrs experience", "summary": "

Passionate software engineer specialising in modern front-end development with React and TypeScript.

", "experience_years": 5.5, "expected_salary": 65000, "salary_currency": "GBP", "availability": "immediately", "profile_visibility": "public", "skills": [ 1, 3, 7 ], "seeker_experiences": [ { "job_title": "Frontend Developer", "company_name": "Tech Corp", "location": "London", "start_date": "2022-01-15", "end_date": "", "is_current": true, "description": "Built React applications serving 500k users." } ], "seeker_educations": [ { "institution": "University of London", "degree": "BSc Computer Science", "field_of_study": "Computer Science", "start_date": "2017-09-01", "end_date": "2021-06-30", "grade": "First Class" } ], "linkedin_url": "https://linkedin.com/in/johndoe", "github_url": "https://github.com/johndoe", "portfolio_url": "https://johndoe.dev", "twitter_url": "https://x.com/johndoe", "website_url": "https://johndoe.com" }

request.description: Get jobs matched to the seeker profile based on skills, location, and preferences.
Submit a job application with optional cover letter, resume, and screening question answers.
Check if the seeker has already applied to a specific job. Use to toggle Apply/Applied button state.
Get paginated list of the seeker applications with job, company, and current stage info.
Get all jobs bookmarked/saved by the seeker.
Toggle the save state for a job. If not saved, saves it. If already saved, removes it. Both POST and DELETE call the same toggle logic.
Toggle the save state for a job — same toggle logic as POST. Conventionally used to unsave.
Get all uploaded resumes for the seeker. The primary resume is flagged with isPrimary: true.
Upload a resume as multipart/form-data. The form field name must be "resume". Accepted formats: PDF, DOC, DOCX. Maximum file size 3 MB.
Permanently delete an uploaded resume.
Get paginated notifications for the seeker (application updates, job matches, system messages).
Mark a single notification as read.
Mark all unread notifications as read in one call.
Get the count of unread notifications. Poll every 30s to update the bell badge.
Get seeker account settings. Response has two keys: user (account info) and prefs (notification/privacy preferences).
Change the seeker account password.

Change the seeker email address directly without OTP. For OTP-verified email change (recommended), use POST /mobile/seeker/settings/email/request-otp followed by POST /mobile/seeker/settings/email/verify-otp.

Step 1 of OTP-verified email change. Validates password, checks new email availability, and sends a 6-digit OTP to the current email address. Then call POST /mobile/seeker/settings/email/verify-otp to complete the change.
Step 2 of OTP-verified email change. Submit the 6-digit code received at the current email address. On success, the email is permanently updated.
Enable or disable two-factor authentication for the seeker account. Current password is always required.
Get paginated audit log showing all login and security events for this account.
Permanently soft-delete the seeker account. No cookies are cleared — the app must discard the stored accessToken immediately after a successful response.
Revoke all active sessions for this seeker account across all devices. No cookies are cleared (mobile has none) — the app must discard the stored accessToken immediately.

Get all admin-controlled feature flags relevant to the employer app. No user authentication required — call this at app launch to conditionally show/hide features. All values are booleans.

• otp_login — OTP is required when employer logs in
• otp_signup — OTP verification is required after employer registers
• companies_house — CH company search is available on the registration form
• job_approval_required — new job posts go to pending and need admin approval before going live
• plans_wallet — subscription plans and wallet credit system are active
• stripe — Stripe payment is available for purchasing plans
• extra_apply_methods — employer can set job apply method to external URL or email (in addition to internal)
• chat — messaging with candidates is available

Get the authenticated employer profile with full company details. User fields use snake_case (first_name, last_name). Company is returned as companies[0]. Use profile_completed (0–100) to show a profile completion bar.

Upload an image file (company logo, banner, etc.) as multipart/form-data. The form field name must be "file". Returns a hosted URL to save in logo_url on the profile update call. Accepted formats: JPEG, PNG, SVG, GIF, WEBP, ICO. Max 3 MB. Note: this endpoint is on the shared /api/v1/ prefix (not /mobile/) as it uses the same upload infrastructure.

Update the company profile. All fields are optional — only send what changed. Blocked if account is suspended. Upload logo first via POST /api/v1/employer/upload, then pass the returned URL as logo_url.

body.raw:
{ "name": "Acme Technologies Ltd", "logo_url": "https://res.cloudinary.com/demo/image/upload/acme-logo.png", "website": "https://acme.com", "about": "

We are a leading technology company building the future of work.

", "industry_category_id": 2, "contact_person": "Jane Smith", "contact_email": "hr@acme.com", "contact_phone": "+44 7700 900123", "show_contact_info": true, "address": "123 Oxford Street", "city": "London", "country": "GB", "zip_code": "W1D 1BS", "company_size": "size_51_200", "work_type": "hybrid", "linkedin_url": "https://linkedin.com/in/johndoe", "facebook_url": "https://facebook.com/acmeTech" }

request.description: Get paginated list of jobs posted by this employer with applicant counts per job.
Create a new job posting. Triggers restricted word check — flagged jobs go to pending review. Blocked if account is suspended or a pending job already exists.

body.raw:
{ "title": "Senior Frontend Developer", "description": "

We are looking for an experienced frontend developer to join our growing team.

", "employment_type": "full_time", "workplace_type": "hybrid", "category_id": "3", "city": "London", "country": "GB", "vacancies": 2, "application_deadline": "2026-12-31", "salary_min": 40000, "salary_max": 80000, "salary_currency": "GBP", "salary_period": "yearly", "responsibilities": "

Lead front-end architecture decisions and mentor junior developers.

", "requirements": "

5+ years of React experience. Strong TypeScript skills required.

", "experience_min_years": 3, "min_education": "bachelors", "preferred_skills": "React, TypeScript, Node.js", "languages_required": "English", "certifications_required": "AWS Certified (preferred)", "age_min": 21, "age_max": 55, "benefits": "[\"Health Insurance\",\"Work From Home\",\"Annual Bonus\",\"Flexible Schedule\"]", "application_method": "internal", "application_email": "careers@acme.com", "application_url": "https://acme.com/careers/apply", "resume_required": "required", "cover_letter_policy": "optional", "auto_reject_after_deadline": false, "screening_questions": [ { "question_text": "Do you have 3+ years of React experience?", "is_required": true, "order_index": 0 }, { "question_text": "Are you eligible to work in the UK?", "is_required": true, "order_index": 1 } ], "status": "draft" }

request.description: Edit an existing job posting. Accepts the same fields as Post a Job — only send what changed. Ownership is verified.
Pause, resume, or close a job posting. Cannot change a rejected job. Cannot set status to active when admin job approval is required.
Soft-delete a job (sets deleted_at + status = closed). Data is preserved. Hidden from all public listings immediately.
Get screening questions for a specific job posted by this employer.
Get paginated applicants for a job with seeker profile info and current stage.
Move an applicant to a different hiring pipeline stage. Triggers notification to the seeker.
Get all candidates saved/shortlisted by this employer.
Toggle save state for a candidate profile. If already saved, unsaves. If not saved, saves.
Get paginated employer notifications (new applicants, job approvals, suspension alerts).
Mark a single employer notification as read.
Mark all unread employer notifications as read.
Get unread notification count for bell badge. Poll every 30s.
Get employer account settings. Response has two keys: user (account info) and prefs (all notification, privacy, and preference settings).
Change the employer account password.

Change the employer email address directly without OTP. For OTP-verified change (recommended), use POST /mobile/employer/settings/email/request-otp followed by POST /mobile/employer/settings/email/verify-otp.

Step 1 of OTP-verified email change. Validates password, checks new email availability, and sends a 6-digit OTP to the current email address. Then call POST /mobile/employer/settings/email/verify-otp to complete the change.
Step 2 of OTP-verified email change. Submit the 6-digit code received at the current email address. On success, the email is permanently updated.
Update the employer phone number.
Update employer notification, privacy, and app preferences. All fields are snake_case. Send only the fields you want to change.

body.raw:
{
  "notif_new_application": true,
  "notif_messages": true,
  "notif_interview": true,
  "notif_security": true,
  "notif_marketing": false,
  "notif_browser": false,
  "company_profile_public": true,
  "show_email_to_candidates": false,
  "show_phone_to_candidates": false,
  "language": "en",
  "timezone": "Europe/London",
  "date_format": "DD/MM/YYYY"
}

request.description: Enable or disable two-factor authentication for the employer account. Current password is always required.
Permanently soft-delete the employer account. All jobs are closed. No cookies are cleared — the app must discard the stored accessToken immediately after a successful response.
Revoke all active sessions for this employer account across all devices. No cookies are cleared (mobile has none) — the app must discard the stored accessToken immediately.
Get paginated audit log showing all login and security events for this employer account.
Get current wallet credit balance and the 10 most recent transactions (only relevant when plans/wallet system is enabled). Note: this endpoint is on the shared /api/v1/ prefix.
Get paginated wallet transaction history. Note: this endpoint is on the shared /api/v1/ prefix.
Get paginated payment / billing history for the employer. Note: this endpoint is on the shared /api/v1/ prefix.
Check whether Stripe payments are enabled and get the publishable key. Call before showing any upgrade/payment UI. Note: this endpoint is on the shared /api/v1/ prefix.
Create a Stripe Embedded Checkout session for a plan purchase. Returns a client_secret used to mount the Stripe UI. Note: this endpoint is on the shared /api/v1/ prefix.
Verify a completed Stripe checkout session and credit the employer wallet. Note: this endpoint is on the shared /api/v1/ prefix.
Get the full stage change history for an application. Used in application detail timeline. Accessible by both the seeker (their own application) and the employer (their job).
Get all conversations for the authenticated user (works for both seeker and employer roles).
Employer-only: Start or retrieve an existing conversation with a seeker for a specific job. Returns existing conversation if one already exists.
Get paginated messages for a conversation. Returns oldest first within each page.
Send a text message in a conversation. Rate limited to 60 messages per 15 minutes per user.
Employer-only: Enable or disable a specific conversation. When disabled, the seeker cannot send further messages.
